title: Mellow Australian Melon Salad
description: A refreshing salad featuring Australian melons, perfect for hot summer days. This shojin-friendly dish is light and comforting, with a delicate floral flavor.
instructions: Place the honeydew and rockmelon cubes in a large bowl.
Add the sliced fresh mint leaves on top of the melon.
In a small bowl, mix together the chilled coconut cream and a pinch of salt.
Pour the coconut cream mixture over the melon and mint.
Garnish with additional mint leaves if desired.
Serve chilled, garnished with edible flowers if desired.
Store any leftover salad in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
Note: This salad is best served immediately, as the coconut cream can become runny over time.
Note: The melon can be cut into balls or left in cubed form, depending on your preference.
